title: AI Briefing: See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses.
summary: Leo Stone reads the latest AI news through platforms, infrastructure, security, product strategy, and operational leverage.

body.text: The useful way to read AI news is to ask what changes in production: platform control, inference cost, data boundaries, security exposure, labor design, and product leverage.

items: See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses.
Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.
Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
Axios C-Suite: The coming AI profit revolt - Axios (Axios)

body.text: The first-order story is rarely enough. A professional reading asks whether the news changes deployment risk, enterprise buying cycles, model economics, developer behavior, or the trust boundary around automation.

body.alt: Image from source article for Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
body.caption: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
body.sourceTitle: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure

body.text: The strongest teams will treat AI headlines as prompts for better operating choices, not as reasons to automate before they understand the work.
